title: Week 14 Data Quality Report
content:
Highest-severity issue: billing_fact row_count check failed on 2026-04-04 with a deficit of 8757 rows.
Second issue: customer_dim freshness SLA breached by 92 minutes after the overnight load failure.
Third issue: schema drift detected in the promotions feed where discount_code was missing for a subset of records.
Recommendation: validate the promotions feed contract before replaying the billing pipeline.
